code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
for line in lines
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut idx = -1
  mut i = 0
  while idx == -1 and i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 61
        idx = i
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if idx >= 0
    let key = string.substring(line, 0, idx)
    let value = string.substring(line, idx + 1, n)
    println("#{key}:#{value}")
  end
end
